name: Line
summary: Represents the value of start and end points in a single line segment.

constructors.name: Line(Point3d, Point3d)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new line segment between two points.

constructors.name: Line(Point3d, Vector3d)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new line segment from start point and span vector.

params.name: span
params.doc: Direction and length of line segment.

constructors.name: Line(Point3d, Vector3d, Double)
constructors.signature: public Line(Point3d start, Vector3d direction, double length)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new line segment from start point, direction and length.

constructors.name: Line(Double, Double, Double, Double, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public Line(double x0, double y0, double z0, double x1, double y1, double z1)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new line segment between two points.

params.name: x0
params.doc: The X coordinate of the first point.

params.name: y0
params.doc: The Y coordinate of the first point.

params.name: z0
params.doc: The Z coordinate of the first point.

params.name: x1
params.doc: The X coordinate of the second point.

params.name: y1
params.doc: The Y coordinate of the second point.

params.name: z1
params.doc: The Z coordinate of the second point.

methods.name: ClosestParameter
methods.summary: Finds the parameter on the infinite line segment that is closest to a test point.

params.name: testPoint
params.doc: Point to project onto the line.

returns.doc: The parameter on the line that is closest to testPoint.

methods.name: ClosestPoint
methods.signature: public Point3d ClosestPoint(Point3d testPoint, bool limitToFiniteSegment)
methods.summary: Finds the point on the (in)finite line segment that is closest to a test point.

params.name: testPoint
params.doc: Point to project onto the line.

params.name: limitToFiniteSegment
params.doc: If true, the projection is limited to the finite line segment.

returns.doc: The point on the (in)finite line that is closest to testPoint.

methods.name: DistanceTo
methods.signature: public double DistanceTo(Point3d testPoint, bool limitToFiniteSegment)
methods.summary: Compute the shortest distance between this line segment and a test point.

params.name: limitToFiniteSegment
params.doc: If true, the distance is limited to the finite line segment.

returns.doc: The shortest distance between this line segment and testPoint.

methods.name: EpsilonEquals
methods.signature: public bool EpsilonEquals(Line other, double epsilon)
methods.summary: Check that all values in other are within epsilon of the values in this

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.Geometry.Line.EpsilonEquals(Rhino.Geometry.Line,System.Double)"]

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.summary: Determines whether an object is a line that has the same value as this line.

returns.doc: true if obj is a Line and has the same coordinates as this; otherwise false.

methods.name: Equals(Line)
methods.summary: Determines whether a line has the same value as this line.

returns.doc: true if other has the same coordinates as this; otherwise false.

methods.name: Extend
methods.signature: public bool Extend(double startLength, double endLength)
methods.summary: Extend the line by custom distances on both sides.

params.name: startLength
params.doc: Distance to extend the line at the start point. Positive distance result in longer lines.

params.name: endLength
params.doc: Distance to extend the line at the end point. Positive distance result in longer lines.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ExtendThroughBox(BoundingBox)
methods.summary: Ensure the line extends all the way through a box. Note, this does not result in the shortest possible line that overlaps the box.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ExtendThroughBox(Box)
methods.summary: Ensure the line extends all the way through a box. Note, this does not result in the shortest possible line that overlaps the box.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ExtendThroughBox(BoundingBox, Double)
methods.signature: public bool ExtendThroughBox(BoundingBox box, double additionalLength)
methods.summary: Ensure the line extends all the way through a box. Note, this does not result in the shortest possible line that overlaps the box.

params.name: additionalLength
params.doc: Additional length to append at both sides of the line.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ExtendThroughBox(Box, Double)
methods.signature: public bool ExtendThroughBox(Box box, double additionalLength)
methods.summary: Ensure the line extends all the way through a box. Note, this does not result in the shortest possible line that overlaps the box.

params.name: additionalLength
params.doc: Additional length to append at both sides of the line.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Flip
methods.summary: Flip the endpoints of the line segment.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Computes a hash number that represents this line.

returns.doc: A number that is not unique to the value of this line.

methods.name: MaximumDistanceTo(Line)
methods.summary: Finds the largest distance between this line as a finite segment and another finite segment.

returns.doc: The maximum distance.

methods.name: MaximumDistanceTo(Point3d)
methods.summary: Finds the largest distance between this line as a finite segment and a test point.

returns.doc: The maximum distance.

methods.name: MinimumDistanceTo(Line)
methods.summary: Finds the shortest distance between this line as a finite segment and another finite segment.

returns.doc: The minimum distance.

methods.name: MinimumDistanceTo(Point3d)
methods.summary: Finds the shortest distance between this line as a finite segment and a test point.

returns.doc: The minimum distance.

methods.name: PointAt
methods.summary: Evaluates the line at the specified parameter.

params.name: t
params.doc: Parameter to evaluate line segment at. Line parameters are normalized parameters.

returns.doc: The point at the specified parameter.

methods.name: PointAtLength
methods.summary: Computes a point located at a specific metric distance from the line origin (From). If line start and end coincide, then the start point is always returned.

params.name: distance
params.doc: A positive, 0, or a negative value that will be the distance from From.

returns.doc: The newly found point.

methods.name: ToNurbsCurve
methods.summary: Constructs a nurbs curve representation of this line. This amounts to the same as calling NurbsCurve.CreateFromLine().

returns.doc: A nurbs curve representation of this line or null if no such representation could be made.

methods.name: ToString()
methods.summary: Constructs the string representation of this line, in the form "From,To".

returns.doc: A text string.

methods.name: ToString(String, IFormatProvider)
methods.signature: public string ToString(string format, IFormatProvider formatProvider)
methods.summary: Formats the value of the current instance using the specified format.

params.name: format
params.doc: The format to use. -or- A null reference (null in Visual Basic) to use the default format defined for the type of the IFormattable implementation.

params.name: formatProvider
params.doc: The provider to use to format the value. -or- A null reference (null in Visual Basic) to obtain the numeric format information from the current locale setting of the operating system.

returns.doc: The value of the current instance in the specified format.

methods.name: Transform
methods.summary: Transform the line using a Transformation matrix.

params.name: xform
params.doc: Transform to apply to this line.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: TryCreateBetweenCurves
methods.signature: public static bool TryCreateBetweenCurves(Curve curve0, Curve curve1, ref double t0, ref double t1, bool perpendicular0, bool perpendicular1, out Line line)
methods.summary: Creates a line segment between a pair of curves such that the line segment is either tangent or perpendicular to each of the curves.

params.name: t0
params.doc: Parameter value of point on curve0. Seed value at input and solution at output.

params.name: t1
params.doc: Parameter value of point on curve 0. Seed value at input and solution at output.

params.name: perpendicular0
params.doc: Find line perpendicular to (true) or tangent to (false) curve0.

params.name: perpendicular1
params.doc: Find line Perpendicular to (true) or tangent to (false) curve1.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: TryFitLineToPoints
methods.signature: public static bool TryFitLineToPoints(IEnumerable<Point3d> points, out Line fitLine)
methods.summary: Attempt to fit a line through a set of points.

params.name: points
params.doc: The points through which to fit.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: TryGetPlane
methods.summary: Gets a plane that contains the line. The origin of the plane is at the start of the line. If possible, a plane parallel to the world XY, YZ, or ZX plane is returned.

params.name: plane
params.doc: If the return value is true, the plane out parameter is assigned during this call.

returns.doc: true on success.

methods.name: Equality
methods.signature: public static bool operator ==(Line a, Line b)
methods.summary: Determines whether two lines have the same value.

returns.doc: true if a has the same coordinates as b; otherwise false.

methods.name: Inequality
methods.signature: public static bool operator !=(Line a, Line b)
methods.summary: Determines whether two lines have different values.

returns.doc: true if a has any coordinate that distinguishes it from b; otherwise false.

properties.name: BoundingBox
properties.summary: Gets the line's 3d axis aligned bounding box.

properties.name: Direction
properties.summary: Gets the direction of this line segment. The length of the direction vector equals the length of the line segment.

properties.name: FromX
properties.summary: Gets or sets the X coordinate of the line From point.

properties.name: FromY
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Y coordinate of the line From point.

properties.name: FromZ
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Z coordinate of the line From point.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not this line is valid. Valid lines must have valid start and end points, and the points must not be equal.

properties.name: Length
properties.summary: Gets or sets the length of this line segment. Note that a negative length will invert the line segment without making the actual length negative. The line From point will remain fixed when a new Length is set.

properties.name: ToX
properties.summary: Gets or sets the X coordinate of the line To point.

properties.name: ToY
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Y coordinate of the line To point.

properties.name: ToZ
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Z coordinate of the line To point.

properties.name: UnitTangent
properties.summary: Gets the tangent of the line segment. Note that tangent vectors are always unit vectors.

properties.name: Unset
properties.summary: Gets a line segment which has Unset end points.
